tags: Scores 1.0 if the target pubkey appears as the zap recipient on at least one kind 9735 zap receipt.
content:
plan
  zaps = do 'nostr.query' {kinds: [9735], '#p': [_.targetPubkey], limit: 1}
in
let
  receipts = zaps | [],
  inbound_count = length(receipts)
in
if inbound_count > 0 then 1.0 else 0.0
